title: bupleurum davisii
intro: Bupleurum davisii, also known as Chinese thorowax, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, native to China and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum davisii include reducing fever, relieving respiratory and gastrointestinal issues, and supporting the body's immune system. Bupleurum davisii can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
